Off Calendar Jul-10-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Michon Errin, Esq. (415-981-5411) for Edgar Garcia, Defendant and moving party / James Mark Millar, Esq. (415-981-8100) for Jowonna Butler, Plaintiff and opposing party

ARGUED - Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument adopts the tentative ruling as follows: DEFENDANT EDGAR GARCIA and JANE CREAGER's MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT is DENIED. Defendants failed to shift burden and show by clear and convincing evidence that moving defendants while being legal title owners are not beneficial owners of the property. Even if burden was shifted, a triable issue of fact exists re: property ownership as mortgage and insurance payments, which are moving defendants' legal obligations, are being paid by co-defendants. Additionally, it is undisputed that current occupants of the premises are not related to moving defendants and former occupant Heather McDonald was not related to any defendant. Prevailing party to prepare order approved as to form. Judge Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk: M. Olopernes, Not reported (D501)
